basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Mechanical Engineering/Computer Science/Mathematics, Strong proficiency in data analysis and statistical methodologies with one year of experience, Hands-on experience in handling SCADA data of wind power plant. Proficiency in WAsP and WindPRO
qualification.details: Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.): Bachelors Degree in Mechanical Engineering/Computer Science/Mathematics. Strong proficiency in data analysis and statistical methodologies with one year of experience. The ability to extract meaningful insights from complex and large-scale datasets is essential. Hands-on experience in handling SCADA data of wind power plant. Proficiency in industry-standard tools such as WAsP and WindPRO is required.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelors Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, or Mathematics, along with one year of experience in data analysis and statistical methodologies.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 29,290/- to Rs. 38,220/-.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q8. What specific experience is required for the Jr. Project Assistant (Tech.) role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have one year of experience in data analysis and statistical methodologies, and hands-on experience in handling SCADA data of a wind power plant.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential technical skills for this position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in data analysis, statistical methodologies, handling SCADA data of wind power plants, and familiarity with tools like WAsP and WindPRO are essential.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the project for which this position is being recruited?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 05 October 2026.
